reviews.review_msg: This has been my favourite prof at SFU and my highest grade received. It is easy to get over 100% on exams if you study the study guides and practice questions (there r bonus questions on all exams). Very caring, class is engaging and interesting content. Take this class/prof if you want a GPA booster!

Jen-Li is an amazing prof. She cares about her students and is super clear about what is going to be on exams. She offers bonus points for lecture and tutorial attendance too, and she brings in guest speakers to make the class engaging. Would definitely take her again.

Not enough words to express how good this class was, I 100/10 recommend taking it. Jen-Li was super caring about her students, made an 8:30am class engaging and was very clear about expectations for the exam and term paper. I'd definitely take a class with her again!

amazing prof, you can really tell she cares about her students! i found her lectures concise and engaging. tests were also pretty fair with lots of MC & written questions. warning for those who hate group projects: there's a group presentation done in tutorial. i found the guest lectures hard to follow & take notes on tho & thats testable

Great prof. Lectures are easy to follow, brings in guest lectures, and gives extra marks if you come to lecture. Exams are easy if you study the lecture notes. Prof is transparent about what will be on exams. Paper wasn't too bad, and the group project was easy as well. Very interesting course about corrections. 10/10 - Highly recommend!

Her lectures are very easy to follow and pretty engaging. The exams are very straightforward as long as you understand the main concepts from the chapters/lectures. There are various quizzes throughout the semester that are online and open-book to make sure you do the reading. I would take another class with Dr. Butler and recommend her classes!

This prof is getting better with more experience. She works hard to bring in extra material that is interesting and makes students think. Sometimes she goes overboard with it. Lectures are fairly well organized. Her marking is fair, just study hard. She relies heavily on the text.

Melissa is an AMAZING prof! Her midterm was easy; class avg was a bit over 80%. Pay attention in class, as she'll give VERY clear hints for what's examinable. Course consisted of midterm, final, 5 min media presentation for completion marks, and term paper (extremely easy). Highly recommend! Great to hear her opinions on current issues! Easy A!
Great prof, really clear on expectations. 1 Paper and the make-up of the midterm was well weighted. Not a criticism but she is very opinionated.

New Prof and she is very good! she knows exactly how students are since she was just one and she has a really good teaching method. Very nice. Must attend lectures because she doesnt post slides and they are very helpful. Fair Exams and 1 paper.  Good Class!

Very reasonable. I kept up with the readings and paid attention to what he highlighted from the text in class; got an A-....Guest speakers and movies were actually interesting and very informative.  I loved this class and i highly recommend it. Keep up, pay attention in class and you'll do well. Oh yeah and MacArthur is an awesome T.A. -   AA
He talks straight out the textbk so nothing new there, but extra materials e.g videos and guest speakers were great.MacArthur the TA is the best! Very interesting and knowledgable!Fun course to take
jons cool, if you can take this class then do it.   definitely a gpa booster.  and the ta's pretty  cool too.
